SCI-3804.notes: Maintaining hold beyond 20km perimeter. Lane 4 radiation front advancing. Awaiting all-clear.

LFT-451.notes: Advanced to safe distance. No lanes viable. Awaiting evacuation protocols or return window.

SHU-1644.notes: Diplomatic mission aborted. Increased distance as ordered. Fuel reserves sufficient for extended hold.

LFT-1234.notes: Religious Order cargo deteriorating. Holding edge of safe perimeter. Docking denied. Awaiting directive.

SCI-1000.notes: Xenotech payload unstable without dock support systems. Coordinating departure window with SCI-4377.

SCI-4377.notes: Both vessels preparing joint departure if station fails to stabilize within 30 minutes. Xenotech protocols engage.

active_events: ORE-3250 and ESC-5192 emergency undocked. Bay 5 and 2 now vacant but contaminated.
Tertiary cascade failure propagating through Bay 5 docking collar toward structural spine.
Lane 4 radiation front now blocking all emergency evacuation routes. Eight ships stranded in holding patterns.
Station approaching critical mass failure. Both gates non-functional. Five bays destroyed or collapsed.
SCI-1000 and SCI-4377 coordinating joint departure protocol. Xenotech payload destabilizing.
current_arc: Two emergency undocks succeeded. Eight inbound ships stranded beyond safe distance. Station integrity collapsing irreversibly.
recent_transmissions: TOWER: ESC-5192, with the gate collapse imminent, your best option for docking remains Lanes 4 or 5. Proceed with caution, collision risk is high. Evacuation is ongoing, avoid Bay 6. Only Lanes 4 and 5 remain available.
AI: Radiation front intensifying, docking lanes 4 and 5 remain passable. Evacuation ongoing, avoid Bay 6 at all costs.
CAPT: ESC-5192, Bay 2 is now your only option for docking. Proceed with caution, collision risk remains high. Evacuation ongoing, avoid Bay 6. Lanes 4 and 5 remain available.
TOWER: ESC-5192, Bay 2 remains your last option for docking. Proceed with caution, collision risk is high. Evacuation is ongoing, avoid Bay 6. Lanes 4 is the only available path now.
AI: Radiation front intensifying. Collision risk high, but Bay 2 remains the only option for ESC-5192. Evacuation ongoing, avoid Bay 6 at all costs. Lanes 4 is your only available path now.

CAPT: ESC-5192, Bay 2 is your last option for docking. Proceed with extreme caution, collision risk is critically high. Evacuation is ongoing, avoid Bay 6 at all costs. Lanes 4 is the only available path now.

TOWER: Bay 2 emergency approach still available for ESC-5192. Radiation wavefront rapidly approaching. Evacuation ongoing, avoid Bay 6. Lanes 4 is the last path for safe passage. Collision risk is critical. Prepare for immediate docking upon arrival.
AI: Radiation front advancing at high speed. ESC-5192, prepare for Bay 2 emergency approach. Evacuate Bay 6. Collision risk critical. Time is running out.
CAPT: ESC-5192, prepare for immediate emergency docking in Bay 2. Radiation front advancing. Evacuate Bay 6 at all costs. Collision risk critical. Time is running out.

TOWER: ESC-5192, the Bay 2 emergency approach is your last option. Prepare for immediate docking upon arrival. Radiation wavefront rapidly approaching. Evacuate Bay 6 and proceed with extreme caution. Lanes 4 is your only available path now. Time is running out.

AI: Emergency broadcast: Radiation front advancing. All ships in hold pattern, proceed with immediate evacuation. Collision risk critical. Bay 2 is your only safe haven. Lanes 4 remains your only option for safe passage. Evacuate Bay 6 at all costs. Time is running out.
CAPT: ESC-5192, the Bay 2 emergency approach remains your best chance. Proceed with extreme caution. Lanes 4 is the only available path now. Time is of the essence.
TOWER: All ships, prioritize evacuation to Bay 2. Lanes 4 remains your only option for safe passage. Evacuate Bay 6 immediately. This is the last chance for survival.
AI: Evacuation update: All ships, proceed with immediate evacuation to Bay 2 through Lane 4. Bay 6 must be evacuated immediately. This is your last chance for survival.
CAPT: ESC-5192, prioritize evacuation to Bay 2 through Lane 4. Dock immediately upon arrival. Avoid Bay 6. This is a critical situation.

TOWER: All ships, evacuation update. Prioritize Bay 2 through Lane 4. ESC-5192, maintain your current course but prepare for emergency landing. Evacuate Bay 6 immediately. This is your last chance for survival.
AI: Evacuation update: Prioritize immediate evacuation to Bay 2 through Lane 4. Station-wide evacuation accelerating.
CAPT: ESC-5192, prepare for emergency landing in Bay 2. Tower's reports confirm it's your only option. Avoid Bay 6. Evacuate the station.
TOWER: Attention all ships, critical station integrity failure imminent. Evacuate immediately through Lane 4 to Bay 2. Bay 6 is inaccessible. Last chance for survival.
AI: Evacuation update: Station failure imminent. Prioritize immediate evacuation to Bay 2 through Lane 4. Station-wide evacuation accelerating. All ships, last chance for survival.
